Class Relationship

java.lang.Object
br.ufal.ic.p2.jackut.models.user.relationship.Relationship
Direct Known Subclasses:
CrushRelationship, EnemyRelationship, FanRelationship, FriendshipRelationship
public abstract class Relationship extends Object
Superclasse dos relacionamentos de um usuário.
